name: reapp-protocol-live
description: Next.js demo of @reapp-sdk/core: an AI agent makes pay-per-use content payments enforced on-chain by the REAPP MandateRegistry.

scripts.test:hackathon: node --test tests/hackathon.test.mjs tests/starter-catalog.test.mjs tests/starter-generation.test.mjs tests/starter-install.test.mjs tests/starter-presenter.test.mjs tests/starter-scenarios.test.mjs tests/shared-runtime.test.mjs tests/scenario-contract.test.mjs tests/scenario-runtime-boundary.test.mjs tests/contract-exact-payment.test.mjs tests/fulfillment-recovery.test.mjs tests/storage-recovery.test.mjs tests/operator-closure.test.mjs
scripts.gatecheck:hackathon: npm run typecheck && npm run test:hackathon && npm run build && npm run smoke:hackathon
